regions.name: San José (transit)
regions.stay_type: boutique hotel in Barrio Escalante or near the airport

activities.category: Barrio Escalante food and coffee scene — best introduction to Costa Rican gastronomy

regions.name: Puerto Viejo (Southern Caribbean)
regions.stay_type: beachfront bungalow or Afro-Caribbean guesthouse in Cocles or Manzanillo

activities.category: Surf Salsa Brava — one of Costa Rica's most powerful reef breaks (experienced surfers)
Cahuita National Park snorkel and jungle trail — coral reef and Caribbean marine life
Chocolate tour at a local cacao farm in the Talamanca mountains
Manzanillo beach and Gandoca-Manzanillo Wildlife Refuge dawn walk

common_mistakes: Renting a car for Puerto Viejo without knowing the Caribbean coast road — it's 220 km from San José but the last section is slow; a direct shuttle is often more comfortable
Visiting in October when Caribbean rainfall is at its peak — December to April and July to September are the most reliable windows
Confusing Puerto Viejo with other Costa Rican beach towns — the Caribbean side has a distinct Afro-Caribbean culture, reggae vibe and food completely different from the Pacific coast
Crossing the border to Bocas del Toro (Panama) without checking the Sixaola–Guabito crossing hours — it closes at 6 pm and is cash-only on the Panamanian side
